workflow.name: Puber Refactor With Audit
workflow.description: Plan, audit, implement, review, fix, and conservatively clean up a Puber Android refactor or migration.

transition_groups.description: Start Puber refactor or migration planning from the task body.
Audited plan is ready; user approval required before implementation.
More implementation steps remain; continue in the same session.
Implementation is complete and needs read-only review.
Review found issues; user approval required before fixes.
Planning or audit is blocked by missing context, access, or user input.
Implementation is blocked by missing input, unsafe state, or verification failure.
Review is blocked by missing context or verification.
Fixing is blocked by missing input, unsafe state, or verification failure.
Cleanup report is ready; finish the task.

edges.prompt_template:
Run the Puber refactor/migration planning flow for this Kent task.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Use .kent/commands/refactor-start.md for refactors and .kent/commands/migration-start.md for migrations, based on the task body. Create an explicit .todo/refactor-<name> or .todo/migration-<name> workspace; do not infer or create .todo/.current.

Analyze scope with project-local agents only, produce plan.md, and do not implement production code yet. If the command text asks for user confirmation, satisfy this workflow by stopping at the implement transition with a clear plan summary.

Complete with implement when an auditable plan is ready and provide workspace_path, plan_path, and audit_report. Complete with blocked if required context or product input is unavailable, and provide blocker_reason.

Implement the approved Puber refactor or migration plan.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Use the explicit workspace {{.Params.workspace_path}} and plan {{.Params.plan_path}}; do not infer .todo/.current. Execute one next unchecked step at a time, preserving compilation after each step. Use ./tools/agentw in .kent/worktrees and ./gradlew in the main checkout.

If more unchecked steps remain, complete with continue_implementation and provide workspace_path plus plan_path again. If all implementation steps are complete, complete with review and provide workspace_path, plan_path, audit_report, changed_files, and verification_summary. Complete with blocked on unresolved blockers and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Path to the explicit .todo/refactor-* or .todo/migration-* workspace created by planning.
Path to the generated plan.md inside the workspace.
Planning audit summary, risk notes, and user-facing implementation constraints.

edges.prompt_template: Continue the approved Puber refactor or migration plan from {{.Params.plan_path}} in workspace {{.Params.workspace_path}}. Execute the next unchecked step, verify narrowly, update plan.md, and complete with continue_implementation, review, or blocked as appropriate.

parameters.description: Path to the explicit .todo/refactor-* or .todo/migration-* workspace.
Path to the plan.md being executed.

edges.prompt_template:
Review the Puber refactor or migration implementation read-only.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Compare changes against {{.Params.plan_path}}, audit risks, AGENTS.md architecture rules, and {{.Params.verification_summary}}. Do not edit files in this node.

Complete with done if accepted, needs_changes if fixes are required and provide workspace_path, review_report, and changed_files, or blocked if review cannot complete and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Path to the explicit .todo/refactor-* or .todo/migration-* workspace.
Path to the plan.md being executed.
Planning audit summary and known risks.
Newline-separated or comma-separated list of files changed by implementation.
Commands run and their pass/fail results.

edges.prompt_template:
Fix the Puber refactor or migration review findings.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Apply only the fixes requested in {{.Params.review_report}} inside {{.Params.workspace_path}}. Verify narrowly, then complete with review and provide workspace_path, review_report, and changed_files. Complete with blocked if unsafe or missing input and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Workspace containing the implementation to fix.
Concrete review findings to fix.
Files changed so far and relevant to the fix pass.

edges.prompt_template: Re-review the fixed Puber refactor or migration. Use {{.Params.review_report}} and {{.Params.changed_files}} as context. Complete with done, needs_changes, or blocked.

parameters.description: Workspace containing the fixed implementation.
Original review findings and fix summary.
Files changed by the implementation and fix pass.
Why planning or audit cannot continue, in the task language when practical.
Why implementation cannot continue, in the task language when practical.
Why review cannot complete, in the task language when practical.
Why fixing cannot continue, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template:
Run conservative Puber task cleanup.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/cleanup-task.md. Only clean project-local Kent worktrees under .kent/worktrees/ when safe. Do not delete external/global worktrees or unmerged user changes. Complete with done and provide cleanup_report.

parameters.description: Summary of cleanup performed or deliberately skipped.
